_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual phrasing will vary.

notes.release_title: v2.14.0 — SSO, recurring tasks, and a faster experience
notes.release_summary: This release delivers two highly-requested features — SAML SSO and recurring tasks — along with significant speed improvements across search and the dashboard. Three bug fixes address issues with duplicate notifications and data filtering.

whats_new.title: Export your projects to CSV
whats_new.description: You can now export any project view to CSV with a single click. Useful for reporting, stakeholder updates, or migrating data.

whats_new.title: Sign in with SSO (SAML 2.0)
whats_new.description: Enterprise teams can now use their existing identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and others) to log in. Contact your admin to configure.

whats_new.title: Recurring tasks
whats_new.description: Set any task to repeat weekly or monthly. Never forget to schedule standup notes, monthly reviews, or regular check-ins again.

improvements.title: Load more projects at once
improvements.description: Project lists now show up to 500 items before paginating. Less scrolling for large workspaces.

improvements.title: Search is 5× faster
improvements.description: Search results now appear in under 1 second on average, down from 4 seconds previously.

improvements.title: Dashboard loads faster
improvements.description: Your dashboard now loads widgets as you scroll, resulting in a noticeably faster initial page load.

bug_fixes.title: Fixed: Duplicate task entries
bug_fixes.description: A rare issue could cause duplicate task entries when multiple users updated the same task simultaneously. This is now resolved.

bug_fixes.title: Fixed: Double email notifications
bug_fixes.description: Tasks assigned to multiple users were triggering duplicate email notifications. Fixed — you'll receive one notification per event.

bug_fixes.title: Fixed: Date filter error in certain timezones
bug_fixes.description: Users in timezones west of UTC (e.g., Americas) could see a filter error when using date ranges. This is resolved.

security.title: Security update
security.description: We updated an internal library to address a security vulnerability. No action required from users. Your data was not affected.

notes.full_text_markdown:
## v2.14.0 — SSO, recurring tasks, and a faster experience

This release delivers two highly-requested features — SAML SSO and recurring tasks — along with significant speed improvements across search and the dashboard. Three bug fixes address issues with duplicate notifications and data filtering.

### ✨ What's New

- **Export your projects to CSV** — Export any project view with one click. Useful for reporting or stakeholder updates.
- **Sign in with SSO (SAML 2.0)** — Enterprise teams can now use Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and other SAML providers.
- **Recurring tasks** — Set tasks to repeat weekly or monthly automatically.

### 🚀 Improvements

- Project lists now support up to 500 items per page (previously 50)
- Search is now 5× faster — results in under 1 second
- Dashboard loads faster with lazy-loaded widgets

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed duplicate task entries on concurrent edits
- Fixed double email notifications for tasks with multiple assignees
- Fixed date filter 500 error for users in UTC-offset timezones

### 🔒 Security

- Updated an internal library to address a security vulnerability. No user action required.
